3066920.name: Nuke Bomberman
3066920.description:
In this exciting game, you will find yourself in a maze where every step could be your last.
Your task is to navigate through the twisty corridors, using bombs to blast through walls and monsters.
But be careful! Collect coins to unlock new levels and reach the goal. Are you ready for an explosive adventure?

Features of this game:
Mazes and explosions: You will need to use bombs to blast through walls and create paths.
Monsters and coins: Encounter monsters that can block your way. Collect coins to unlock new levels.
